description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof that doubles as a spacious rooftop terrace. The terrace features an octagonal swimming pool, multiple lounge and dining areas with contemporary outdoor furniture, and a barbecue grill. The exterior is clad in dark brown panels, with large vertical and horizontal windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The house has a boxy, geometric form with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, characteristic of modern architectural styles. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or decorative elements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat rooftop terrace featuring a pool, lounge, and dining areas, clad in dark brown panels with large asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rooftop terrace with the pool, dining table, and lounge area, as well as the tall windows on the side facade.
description_view_1: This view shows the front facade with multiple large windows and the main entryway, as well as the terrace's dining and pool areas.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the geometric shape of the house, the pool, and the arrangement of windows on two intersecting facades.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the pool and lounge area on the terrace, with the rear and side facades showing more windows and the secondary entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
